name: Cake Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 9 x 13 baking pan.
2. In a small saucepan, mix butter, oil, water, and cocoa. Bring to a boil.
3. Add the boiling mixture to flour and sugar. Mix until smooth.
4. Add eggs, baking soda, buttermilk, and vanilla. Mix well.
5. Pour batter into prepared baking pan. Bake for 20 minutes.
6. Prepare frosting by mixing all ingredients in a medium saucepan. Heat gently; do not boil.
7. Frost the brownies immediately after removing from oven. Cut into squares when cool.
